hints.question: How do I pick out which letters become the acronym?
hints.answer: The letters you want are the ones that start each word. That's usually the very first character of the phrase, plus any character that comes right after a space or hyphen.

hints.question: How do I find the characters that come right after a space or hyphen?
hints.answer: Loop through the phrase one character at a time, keeping track of what the previous character was. If the previous character was a space or hyphen (or you're at the very start), the current character is the start of a word.

hints.question: How do I build up the result as I go?
hints.answer: Start with an empty result string and append each chosen letter onto the end using concatenation with `+`.

hints.question: I've got the right letters but my answer's lowercase
hints.answer: Once you've built the full string, convert it to uppercase in one go using `toUpperCase()` before returning it.
